import { ErrorConstructorTag } from '../constants'; type ErrorValue = Error | AggregateError | EvalError | RangeError | ReferenceError | TypeError | SyntaxError | URIError; export declare function getErrorConstructor(error: ErrorValue): ErrorConstructorTag; export declare function getErrorOptions(error: Error, features: number): Record<string, unknown> | undefined; export {}; //# sourceMappingURL=error.d.ts.map
